name: list_directory
description: List files and subdirectories in the workspace.

path.description: Relative path inside the workspace to list. Defaults to root ('.').

name: read_file
description: Read the full content of a file from the workspace.

path.description: Relative path of the file to read.

name: write_file
description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing file in the workspace.

path.description: Relative path of the file to write.

content.description: Full content to write to the file.

name: edit_file
description: Apply a specific text replacement inside an existing file in the workspace.

path.description: Relative path of the file to edit.

old_string.description: The exact block of text to find.

new_string.description: The text block to replace it with.

name: execute_command
description: Execute a terminal command in the workspace directory. Use to run scripts, build files, run tests, or check status.

command.description: The exact terminal command to run.

name: create_directory
description: Create a new directory in the workspace.

path.description: Relative path of the directory to create.

name: delete_file
description: Delete a file or empty directory from the workspace.

path.description: Relative path of the file or directory to delete.

name: move_file
description: Rename or move a file or directory within the workspace.

source.description: Current relative path of the file or directory.

destination.description: New relative path for the file or directory.

name: spawn_agent
description: Delegate a complex, multi-step coding task to a background agent that runs independently. Returns a unique job ID.

description.description: A detailed description of the task for the agent, e.g. 'write unit tests for file.py'.

name: get_agent_status
description: Check the status, logs, and finished work of a previously spawned background agent using its job ID.

job_id.description: The unique job ID of the agent to query.

name: list_agents
description: List all background agents with their status summary.
